5.reason: [Using uninitialized variable c1 in loop condition may cause undefined behavior; though assigned '+', the logic assumes c1 is never '=' initially, but more critically, the program uses <bits/stdc++.h> which is non-standard and may cause compilation error in strict C compilers]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Using uninitialized variable c1 in loop condition may cause undefined behavior; though assigned '+', the logic assumes c1 is never '=' initially, but more critically, the program uses <bits/stdc++.h> which is non-standard and may cause compilation error in strict C compilers]
